title: rubus tereticaulis var. innoxius
intro: Rubus tereticaulis var. innoxius, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in tannins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus tereticaulis var. innoxius is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
